name: codeval-codemd-graphs
description: Search this workspace with local CODE.md analysis and interactive graph browsing.

codemdGraphs.autoWriteProjectMcpConfig.description: Write the project-scoped .mcp.json file when a workspace opens.

codemdGraphs.autoReveal.description: Automatically open the CODE.md panel when a workspace loads, so the callgraph appears without needing to click the CODE.md activity bar icon first.

codemdGraphs.backendDir.description: Path to the folder containing the CODE.md analyzer backend (main.py). Leave empty to use the backend bundled with this extension. If no bundled backend is available, Generate CODE.md will prompt for an explicit backend folder.

codemdGraphs.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to launch the local FastAPI server. Leave unset (default) to have the extension auto-create and manage an isolated virtual environment with the required dependencies in global storage. Set this explicitly to use a specific interpreter instead — in that case it must already have backend/requirements.txt installed.

codemdGraphs.analysisMode.description: How Generate CODE.md runs local analysis. Use cli for the default local subprocess path; use server to force the FastAPI workflow.

codemdGraphs.host.description: Host the local FastAPI server binds to.

codemdGraphs.port.description: Port the local FastAPI server binds to.

codemdGraphs.excludeGlobs.description: Additional glob patterns to exclude when zipping the workspace for analysis, on top of the built-in defaults (.git, node_modules, venvs, build output).
